votes.reason: The Python code accurately translates the Coq definitions, including character case swapping, vowel modification, and string mapping.
The Python code accurately translates the Coq string manipulation and encoding logic, preserving all character transformations and conditions.
The Python code accurately translates the Coq definitions, including character case swapping, vowel shifting, and string mapping, preserving the exact logic and behavior.

The Python code faithfully implements the Coq specification. uppercaseb/lowercaseb check the same ASCII ranges, swap_case converts upper to lower (add 32) and lower to upper (subtract 32), vowelb checks the same 10 vowel codes (A/E/I/O/U in both cases), vowel_change adds 2 to vowels, encode_char composes swap_case then vowel_change, string_map applies a function to each character, and encode_fun/encode_spec work identically. All concrete inputs will produce the same results.

The Python code faithfully implements the Coq specification. uppercaseb/lowercaseb check the same ASCII ranges, swap_case converts upper to lower (add 32) and lower to upper (subtract 32), vowelb checks the same 10 vowel codes, vowel_change adds 2 to vowels, encode_char composes vowel_change and swap_case in the same order, string_map applies a function to each character, and encode_fun/encode_spec produce the same results for all concrete string inputs.

The Python code faithfully implements the Coq specification. uppercaseb/lowercaseb check the same ASCII ranges, swap_case converts case identically (uppercase to lowercase by adding 32, lowercase to uppercase by subtracting 32), vowelb checks the same ASCII codes for vowels (A,E,I,O,U,a,e,i,o,u), vowel_change adds 2 to vowel codes, encode_char composes swap_case then vowel_change, string_map applies a function to each character, and encode_spec checks equality with encode_fun's result. All concrete behaviors match.

Functions are direct translations: case checks, swaps, vowel detection, and mapping match Coq’s behavior on ASCII chars; composition and string mapping are preserved, and Prop vs bool doesn’t affect concrete results.
Python mirrors the Coq logic: same ASCII range checks, case swap, vowel shift by +2 after swap, per-character mapping, and the spec is equality. Behaviors coincide on all concrete inputs.
Python mirrors Coq: same ASCII range checks for case, same swap, vowel check on the swapped char with +2, maps over string identically, and encode_spec checks equality.
